message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate more bracket patterns to emitCallCtx

- file.zig: PyFile.write with 2-arg context
- validation.zig: isStringAllWhitespace
- print.zig: runtime.formatAny for boolean args
- misc.zig: @as(i64/f64, ...) helper functions
- constants.zig: PyComplex.create with special float handling
- with.zig: @TypeOf pattern for variable hoisting

Ensures bracket matching through function structure.
